service_type: Payment processing and customer transaction storage

security_evidence.encryption_at_rest: AES-256 for database, not confirmed for backups
security_evidence.encryption_in_transit: TLS 1.3 for API, TLS 1.2 for internal services
security_evidence.key_management: AWS KMS, rotation policy not documented
security_evidence.penetration_testing: Last pen test: Q1 2024, results not shared with clients
security_evidence.vulnerability_scanning: Monthly automated scans, quarterly manual review
security_evidence.incident_response_plan: Claims to have one, not shared
security_evidence.access_controls: RBAC implemented, MFA for admin accounts only
security_evidence.employee_background_checks: For engineering and ops teams only

privacy_evidence.cross_border_transfers: Acknowledged but no SCCs or BCRs provided
privacy_evidence.consent_mechanism: Vendor relies on customer's own consent collection
privacy_evidence.data_subject_rights: Claims compliance with GDPR Articles 15-22, process not documented
privacy_evidence.privacy_policy: Generic privacy policy, no vendor-specific data handling details
privacy_evidence.cookie_tracking: Uses third-party cookies in merchant dashboard

financial_indicators.insurance: Claims cyber liability insurance, certificate not provided

compliance_certifications: PCI-DSS Level 1 (via Stripe tokenization, not direct)

sla_terms.support_response: 4 hours for critical, 24 hours for standard
